name: YRGLM Inc.
summary: YRGLM Inc. provides marketing automation platforms in Japan. It offers AD EBiS, a platform which measures and analyzes the effect obtained from Internet advertisement; THREe, which enables automatic optimization and submission to the elements of marketing automation; and EC-CUBE, a commercial distribution platform, as well as ADREPO, an automatic creation tool for operational advertisement report. The company was formerly known as LOCKON Co., LTD. and changed its name to YRGLM Inc. in August 2019. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
